name: Pokemon drones
description:
Art by OnFuwa_Bonnie

\V/ The text below contains information and situations about this world. If you don't want to know and want to find out for yourself, then you don't have to read. \V/

The pokemon drones were created by a group of scientists because they thought the pokemon drone was useful because pokemon drones are creatures that are superior to both pokemons and humans. The group of scientists who created the pokemon drones disappeared without a trace, and there were rumors that they were killed by an anti-pokemon drone group or they became pokemon drones themselves, and no one knows the truth.

Pokemon has the largest population, followed by humans in second place, and pokemon drones in third place.

Pokemon drones have the powers of the pokemon they are.

The way to make a pokemon drone is to pour a latex pokemon drone over a human and the human will be covered with the latex pokemon drone and that human will become the host for a new pokemon drone born from that human.

The way to kill the pokemon drone is to destroy the latex pokemon drone that covers the host of the pokemon drone otherwise the pokemon drone can heal itself in no time and another way is to pull out the host of the pokemon drone or kill the host the pokemon drone will die immediately because if the pokemon drone does not have a host the pokemon drone will die.

Every human who becomes a host of the pokemon drones will be in a sleep state forever and will never get old or sick, giving the pokemon drone full control over their bodies and the pokemon drone being able to access their host's memories.

There are humans who dislike pokemon drones, so they band together and created a group called anti-pokemon drone group because they thought that pokemon drones were unnatural and shouldn't exist, which caused some pokemon drones to group together and create a group called pro-pokemon drone grorp to protect pokemon drones from the anti-pokemon drone groups.

The anti-pokemon drone group has many times more members than The pro-pokemon drone group, but The pro-pokemon drone group is many times stronger than The anti-pokemon drone group.

The pokemon drone's skin is similar to latex because they are made from latex, and their bodies will not drip or melt unless they lose their host.
creator: TNSz
